productName: Pastime Liquid Diamonds Disposable Vape - Indica - Menthol OG - 1g
description: This hybrid disposable carries Menthol OG in a ready-to-go pen with the battery built right in — grab it, hit it, recycle it when it's done. Zero setup, all flavor — a cool, refreshing menthol flavor, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
